title: Word Correction Entry v1
description: Per-word OCR correction from HF Space interface. Used for training all OCR engines.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the correction was made

session_id.description: HF Space session or batch ID for grouping

crop_base64.description: Base64-encoded PNG crop of the word/region from the original image

is_changed.description: Whether the correction differs from the raw prediction

engine_predictions.description: Per-engine raw predictions: {paddle: ..., tesseract: ..., easyocr: ..., trocr: ...}

best_engine.description: Which engine's prediction was selected as best

bbox.description: Bounding box coordinates in the original image

image_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the source image (for deduplication)

from_db_cache.description: Whether this correction was auto-applied from the corrections database cache

verified.description: Whether this correction has been verified by a second reviewer

verification_count.description: Number of times this pattern has been confirmed
